ai_summary: Kothari Sugars and Chemicals Limited submitted a routine compliance certificate under SEBI Regulation 74(5) for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. The attached certificate from their Registrar and Share Transfer Agent confirms all share dematerialization requests were processed accurately, within the 15-day regulatory timeframe, and records updated. This indicates strong operational compliance and good corporate governance in managing shareholder records, with no red flags identified.
